text: [S_0] ("2026-01-01", "Patient admitted for pre-renal AKI with hyperpotassemia and hyponatremia Presents: patient alert, conscious and oriented t/s eupnoeic in room air SpO2 94% RF 20br/m HR 110ar BP 70/40 isosfigmic pulses, very weak and normally reactive, skin normal in color and hydration.", 0.0, 0.1) | [S_1] ("2026-01-01", "hydrated mucous membranes.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_2] ("2026-01-01", "GCS 15.", 0.0, 0.5) | [S_3] ("2026-01-01", "no neurological deficits, valid diuresis from VC with 700cc of stagnation (straw yellow) apyretic Perform artierial BGA check-up: Upon Dr. PERSONS_NAME's recommendation, the previous therapy is suspended - infusion of R.Acetate 500cc at 84cc/h", 0.0, 0.5)
